incident_details.short_description: Lead popup web resource cannot update parent form
incident_details.description: A custom popup opened from the Lead form is supposed to update the Topic field on the parent Lead, but users report that clicking Save in the popup does nothing.

resolution.root_cause: The popup script attempted to use window.parent.Xrm.Page, but the popup was not embedded in the form. The parent form reference was available through window.opener for this browser flow.
resolution_steps: Confirmed the web resource was opened in a separate popup window, not embedded in the Lead form.
Changed the popup script to check for window.opener before attempting to access the parent form.
Used the parent form context to set the Topic field and fire the onchange handler.
Added error handling that shows a user-friendly message if the popup is opened without a parent form.
Published the web resource and verified the Topic field updates on the Lead form.

source_inspiration.title: Dynamics 365 V9 web resource get context
